title: 3 Coast FIRE Myths Nobody Corrects — Debunked
description: Most people get Coast FIRE wrong. This pin busts the three most common myths so you can calculate your real number and actually stop saving on time. coast fire calculator · coast fire · coast fire retirement calculator · fire calculator · financial independence · retire early
